ConnectionStrings.//: AiwmsAzure connects to the Azure SQL AIWMS DB via Managed Identity (App Service) or AAD Default (local dev via az login). NO password.
ConnectionStrings.//1: Per-country on-prem connections live in App Service > Connection strings under these keys (LPMSIM pattern). Override via secrets / appsettings.Development.json locally.
ConnectionStrings.//2: OnPremBackupDB is a single UAE-only backup that hosts: contreceipt, upc_subclass, SubclassMaster.
